name: ABM INDUSTRIES INC /DE/
business: ABM Industries is a leading provider of facility maintenance, engineering, and infrastructure solutions, offering janitorial, parking, HVAC, electrical, microgrid, and other services across multiple industries. The company serves clients through segments including Business & Industry, Manufacturing & Distribution, Aviation, Education, and Technical Solutions.
sellsTo: commercial real estate properties including corporate offices, sports venues, and healthcare facilities
manufacturing, distribution, and data center facilities
public school districts, private schools, colleges, and universities

exposures.sentence: With the addition of Quality Uptime, we now offer comprehensive and complementary critical infrastructure solutions for data centers and similar crucial facilities, including electrical testing, electrical switchgear maintenance, breaker testing, UPS service and maintenance, and battery and power distribution unit service and maintenance.

A complementary extension of ABM's Technical Solutions service offerings, the addition of RavenVolt enhanced ABM's position as a market leader in electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure, power, and bundled energy solutions.

A complementary extension of ABM's Technical Solutions service offerings, the addition of RavenVolt enhanced ABM's position as a market leader in electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure, power, and bundled energy solutions.
Direct labor costs represented 68% of our total revenue for 2025.

Our information technology systems and those of our third-party providers or clients could be the target of cyberattacks, ransomware attacks, hacking, unauthorized access, phishing, computer viruses, malware, or other intrusions, which could result in operational disruptions or information misappropriation...

catalysts.event: Restructuring program expected to deliver ~$35 million annualized cost savings once fully implemented in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Once fully implemented in 2026, this program is expected to deliver approximately $35.0 million of annualized cost savings.

catalysts.event: RavenVolt contingent consideration payment of $32.5 million expected in May 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect the RavenVolt business to achieve the financial target that would require a $32.5 million payment for calendar year 2025, and as such, we currently expect to make this payment in May 2026.

catalysts.event: WGNSTAR Acquisition expected to be consummated in the first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: The benefits that are expected to result from the WGNSTAR Acquisition, which we expect to be consummated in the first half of 2026, will depend, in part, on our ability to realize the anticipated growth opportunities and the realization of anticipated cost and revenue synergies.
